witnessed_by: Dmitriy Grankin (owner) + CTO-driven demos where noted
deployment: lite (witness box 172.238.52.94, vexaai/vexa-lite:v0.12.4, local CPU whisper)

values.title: lite: default IMAGE_TAG to v012 (stop depending on :latest, which is being deleted)
values.evidence: deploy default-tag change; the v0.12.4 witness box itself exercises the published-tag install path (make up IMAGE_TAG=v0.12.4 pulled + healthy)

values.title: fix(jitsi): recognize members-only lobby authoritatively + typed admission timeout (#592)
values.pass: no-mod: typed awaiting_admission_timeout not join_failure; mod: enters + transcribes
values.observation: owner confirmed: jitsi members-only lobby recognized; with moderator the bot entered and transcribed

values.title: fix(bot): MS Teams bot self-evicts ~120ms after a successful join (#593)
values.pass: bot admitted, stays active >2min, never self-evicts with join_failure/pipeline_start_failed
values.observation: owner confirmed: bot joined a real Teams meeting, admitted, stayed active >2min, no self-evict

values.title: gateway: isolate auth pool + 503-not-401 on auth-infra failure (#495)
values.evidence: gateway tests: test_adapters_resolve.py::test_build_wires_separate_pools (distinct pools) + test_proxy.py::test_auth_infra_failure_is_503 (503 not 401); green in gateway+conformance lanes

values.title: meeting-api: transcript reads release the DB before the Redis merge (#508)
values.evidence: meeting-api test_tx_scope.py::test_no_session_held_across_non_db_await (ast gate, RED@base GREEN@head) + test_transcript_merge.py; meeting-api lane green

values.title: meeting-api + runtime: harden bare Redis clients + standing gate (#528)
values.evidence: test_no_bare_redis_clients (ast gate) in meeting-api + runtime tests, RED@base(3 findings) GREEN@head, planted-violation controls; chaos self-heal is COMPOSE_CHAOS gated

values.title: webhooks: event_id stable per logical event, not per emission (#519)
values.evidence: meeting-api test_webhook_identity.py (deterministic id, 4 cases incl uuid4-revert negative control) + re-seal gate:schema/gate:contract-version green

values.title: config-contract: bring admin-api + gateway under gate:config-contract (#526)
values.evidence: CTO-driven live demo on vexaai/v012-admin-api:v0.12.4: boot WITHOUT INTERNAL_API_SECRET -> ConfigError naming the key, exit 1 (fail-closed); negative control WITH the secret passed preflight and proceeded to DB. Per-service test_config_contract.py + gate:config-contract.

values.title: meeting-api: pipeline liveness observable + bounded stream retention (#527)
fix(gmeet): prevent X11 input commands from hanging
values.evidence: join module googlemeet/humanized humanized.test.ts (X11 timeout) green in node/join lane

values.title: feat(bot): expose Google Meet speaker stream tuning
db-budget: CI gate auditing Σ(replicas × pool ceiling) vs max_connections (#529)
values.evidence: gate:db-budget (pnpm gate:db-budget green: Σ/100 fits) + deploy/db-budget.json

values.title: fix(recordings): per-chunk durable upload + finalize-on-read — confirmed uploads retrievable (#509, #491, #412)
values.evidence: test_recordings.py (byte-exact single/multi-chunk, crash-no-final serves uploaded parts, #491 empty-final guard) green on #611 head in the meeting-api python lane; validate-lite green on v0.12.4. LIVE kill-mid-meeting (A5) deferred — needs real meeting audio; a fresh image re-run here was blocked only by missing pytest-asyncio in the runtime image (infra, not a code failure).

values.title: seal the DB schema: gate:db-schema freezes tables+columns
values.evidence: gate:db-schema (68 cols/9 tables sealed, schema.seal.json) green in static lane

values.title: release: enforce witness + batch-value acceptance gates (ADR-0029)
values.evidence: release governance machinery (witness+value gates); CI green; not a runtime value
